backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining all backend data types (Journey, LocationInfo, CityAlbum, TravelSpot, MusicAlbum, etc.) and their stable storage maps, along with blob storage, access control, and registry initialization.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two features: inserting the TimeControls component into the left panel of LocationMapExplorer below the Global Control section, and wiring up time state so the solar terminator on the InteractiveGlobe responds to TimeControls.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON file containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the frontend codebase.
frontend/index.html: Root HTML entry point for the React app, loading the SunCalc library via CDN and mounting the app into a div with id 'root'.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that wraps the app with ThemeProvider, InternetIdentityProvider, and QueryClientProvider, rendering LocationMapExplorer alongside BackendDebugger and a Toaster.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin panel component providing tabbed management of journeys, schedules (keyed by journey title), travel spots, music albums, geoname data, and timezones with full CRUD dialogs.
Utility component that exposes the backend actor as window.backend and logs debugging instructions (role checks, admin promotion) to the browser console on mount.
frontend/src/components/CityAlbumManager: City album manager component supporting media file uploads (images/videos) and social media link management per city, with real-time URL validation and authentication checks.
frontend/src/components/CityloguePanel.t: A simple placeholder panel component for city ratings and travel spots overview, accepting an optional callback for spot focus events.
frontend/src/components/GeonameGeographi: A full CRUD management UI for GeoNames city data, supporting TSV file import, paginated browsing, search, and add/edit/delete operations via React Query hooks.
frontend/src/components/HeartRating.tsx: An interactive 10-heart rating component supporting partial fills, hover previews, and click-position-based decimal ratings from 0.1 to 10.0.
frontend/src/components/InteractiveGlobe: A Three.js-based 3D interactive globe component with support for timezones, city markers, country labels, solar terminator, twilight, and flight path animations.
frontend/src/components/itinerary/Doodle: Renders a scrapbook/doodle-styled itinerary dialog for a journey, displaying day-by-day schedule items with Comic Sans styling and amber/orange color theming.
frontend/src/components/itinerary/RetroI: Renders a vintage postcard/retro-styled itinerary dialog for a journey, displaying day-by-day schedule items with serif fonts, postmark effects, and warm amber/red color theming.
frontend/src/components/LocationInfoDial: A dialog for adding, editing, or deleting a photo associated with a map location, handling file upload/preview and persisting data via React Query mutations.
frontend/src/components/LoginPanel.tsx: An Internet Identity authentication panel rendered as a dialog, showing login/logout status, principal ID, and handling auth state via a custom hook.
frontend/src/components/MapComponent.tsx: A Leaflet-based interactive map component that renders travel spots, schedule items, and bookmarks as markers with popups, supporting zoom controls, city filtering, and a dialog for adding new bookmarks.
frontend/src/components/MediaGalleryPopu: A tabbed media gallery popup component that displays photos, videos, and embedded social media links (YouTube, Instagram) for a travel spot, with carousel navigation for images.
frontend/src/components/MusicAlbumManage: An admin UI component for managing music albums and songs, supporting creation, editing, deletion, and file uploads of albums and individual songs via dialogs and forms.
frontend/src/components/MusicPanel.tsx: A dialog-based music panel that lists all music albums and their songs, allowing users to select a song for playback, with an empty state for unauthenticated or album-less users.
frontend/src/components/MusicPlayerBar.t: A persistent music player bar component with play/pause, skip, volume, and progress controls that streams songs from blob storage and supports both internal and externally controlled song selection.
frontend/src/components/TimeControls.tsx: React component for controlling time simulation modes (real, hourly, yearly) with play/pause functionality. Supports both a compact vertical sidebar layout and a default horizontal layout.
frontend/src/components/TimezoneManageme: Admin component for uploading and managing timezone GeoJSON data, supporting file upload to the backend canister with IndexedDB caching and a manual multi-step execution/verification flow.
Panel component displaying journeys and their schedule items, with filtering by live/upcoming/past status, flight animation triggers, 2D map integration, and itinerary dialog views.
frontend/src/components/TravelSpotManage: CRUD manager for travel spots with support for city filtering, media file uploads, social media link validation, and heart ratings, using React Query hooks for backend interaction.
frontend/src/components/VibesPanel.tsx: Panel that aggregates and displays travel spots and bookmarks grouped by city and type, with collapsible sections, type-specific icons, and focus callbacks for map interaction.
frontend/src/components/WebsiteLayoutPan: A settings panel dialog for managing website layout preferences including music player toggle, default search location, and travel spot display options, with real-time local time display.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both authenticated and anonymous identities, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook for ICP, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle via a React context provider.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Central React Query hooks file defining all data-fetching and mutation hooks for the app, including geocoding, journey management, layout preferences, music, travel spots, and social media link validation.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light/dark theme color tokens, including blue music player palette variables and specific heading color rules for dark/bright backgrounds.
frontend/src/lib/solarCalculations.ts: Provides a utility function to calculate solar declination angle for a given day of the year using the standard cosine formula, along with test cases for solstices and equinoxes.
frontend/src/lib/timezoneOffsetUtils.ts: Exports a helper function that filters a GeoJSON timezone dataset to return all timezone IDs matching a given UTC offset (with quarter-hour precision) using the Intl API.
frontend/src/lib/timezoneUtils.ts: Manages loading and caching of timezone GeoJSON boundary data, using IndexedDB as a local cache and falling back to a backend fetch, with validation and window-level caching.
frontend/src/lib/TzOverlayV2.ts: Renders timezone boundaries on a 3D Three.js globe with quarter-hour UTC offset precision, supporting translucent fill meshes and LineLoop borders for hovered timezone polygons.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React application entry point that mounts the app with React Query and Internet Identity authentication providers.
frontend/src/pages/LocationMapExplorer.t: Main page component that combines an interactive globe/map view with multiple side panels (travelogue, music, admin, etc.), time controls with animation modes, and authentication-aware UI.
frontend/src/utils/scheduleDayStyling.ts: Provides color and label utilities for schedule day indicators (D1, D2, etc.), including functions to compute a zero-based day index from nanosecond timestamps and format human-readable day context strings.
frontend/src/utils/scheduleRouteUtils.ts: Groups schedule items by calendar day, sorts them chronologically by time, and builds per-day route data (coordinates and items) for map rendering.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence helpers and a function to remove sensitive params from the URL hash without reloading.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens (primary, secondary, sidebar, chart, etc.), border radius variables, accordion keyframe animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Tracks the Globe Explorer project's current state (version 3), including existing features for TimeControls integration with a 3D globe's solar terminator, known UI layout issues, and a pending feature request to add a Time Controls button below the Global Control button.
